data.body: CI fixes on the pushed stack (2 real issues, both in e622): (1) docs/cli-reference.md is GENERATED (scripts/gen_cli_reference.py + drift gate) -- the implementer hand-edited it; regenerated to revert (import-channel docs stay in event-schema.md + output-schemas.md). (2) basename collision: 3 test_creation_channel.py files (facades/io/reconciler) + default prepend importmode + no __init__.py -> CI's 'pytest -m not integration and not external' collection ERRORs. Fixed by renaming the 2 e622 files to unique basenames: io->test_creation_channel_import.py, reconciler->test_creation_channel_jira.py (kept 6fe2's facades). Updated e622 ACs + verify_commands to match. Amended e622 (a7e9058) + re-pushed #765. Also amended earlier for cli-reference (30107ea). 6fe2 (#764 patchset 3) unchanged.
